members.name: Name
members.description: Gets the name of the person or company at this address.

members.name: Name2
members.description: Gets the second address name line (e.g. department, c/o).

members.name: Name3
members.description: Gets the third address name line.

members.name: Street
members.description: Gets the street name.

members.name: HouseNumber
members.description: Gets the house or building number.

members.name: PostalCode
members.description: Gets the postal or ZIP code.

members.name: City
members.description: Gets the city name.

members.name: CountryCode
members.description: Gets the ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code (e.g. "DEU").

members.name: State
members.description: Gets the state or province, if applicable.

members.name: Success
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether the cancellation was successful.

members.name: Message
members.description: Gets an optional message with additional details about the result.

members.name: Name
members.description: Gets the contact person's name.

members.name: Email
members.description: Gets the email address.

members.name: Phone
members.description: Gets the phone number.

members.name: Length
members.description: Gets the length of the package.

members.name: Width
members.description: Gets the width of the package.

members.name: Height
members.description: Gets the height of the package.

members.name: Weight
members.description: Gets the weight of the package.

members.name: WeightUnit
members.description: Gets the unit of measurement for . Defaults to .

members.name: Dimensions
members.description: Gets the physical dimensions of the package, if specified.

members.name: DimensionUnit
members.description: Gets the unit of measurement for . Defaults to .

members.name: StatusCode
members.description: Gets the HTTP status code returned by the carrier API, if available.

members.name: ErrorCode
members.description: Gets the carrier-specific error code, if available.

members.name: RawResponse
members.description: Gets the raw response body from the carrier API, if available.

members.name: Format
members.description: Gets the format of the label content (e.g. PDF, ZPL).

members.name: Content
members.description: Gets the raw label content as a byte array.

members.name: Shipper
members.description: Gets the shipper (sender) address.

members.name: Consignee
members.description: Gets the consignee (recipient) address.

members.name: ShipperContact
members.description: Gets optional contact information for the shipper.

members.name: ConsigneeContact
members.description: Gets optional contact information for the consignee.

members.name: Packages
members.description: Gets the list of packages to be shipped.

members.name: Reference
members.description: Gets an optional customer reference for the shipment.

members.name: ShipDate
members.description: Gets the planned ship date, if specified.

members.name: ShipmentNumber
members.description: Gets the carrier-assigned shipment number.

members.name: Labels
members.description: Gets the list of shipping labels. May be empty if no labels were generated.

members.name: TrackingUrl
members.description: Gets the URL for tracking the shipment online, if available.

members.name: Timestamp
members.description: Gets the timestamp when this event occurred, or null when the carrier did not provide a timestamp.

members.name: Location
members.description: Gets the formatted location string (e.g. "Bonn, DE"), if available.

members.name: Description
members.description: Gets a human-readable description of the event.

members.name: StatusCode
members.description: Gets the carrier-specific status code for this event, if available.

members.name: ShipmentNumber
members.description: Gets the shipment number.

members.name: Status
members.description: Gets the current overall tracking status.

members.name: Events
members.description: Gets the chronological list of tracking events. May be empty.

members.name: EstimatedDelivery
members.description: Gets the estimated delivery date and time, if available.

members.name: Services
members.description: Gets the underlying service collection.

members.name: ApiKey
members.description: Gets or sets the DHL API key (also used as OAuth client_id).

members.name: ApiSecret
members.description: Gets or sets the DHL API secret (OAuth client_secret). Required for shipping operations.

members.name: Username
members.description: Gets or sets the DHL ROPC username. Required for shipping operations.

members.name: Password
members.description: Gets or sets the DHL ROPC password. Required for shipping operations.

members.name: TrackingUsername
members.description: Gets or sets the Parcel DE Tracking XML API appname credential. Required for Dhl.Tracking (Parcel DE Tracking v0). Sandbox default: zt12345.

members.name: TrackingPassword
members.description: Gets or sets the Parcel DE Tracking XML API password credential. Required for Dhl.Tracking (Parcel DE Tracking v0). Sandbox default: geheim.

members.name: InternetmarkeUsername
members.description: Gets or sets separate Internetmarke (Portokasse) username. If null, is used instead.

members.name: InternetmarkePassword
members.description: Gets or sets separate Internetmarke (Portokasse) password. If null, is used instead.

members.name: UseSandbox
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the DHL sandbox environment.

members.name: CustomShippingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the shipping API. When set, this takes precedence over the setting.

members.name: CustomTrackingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Parcel DE Tracking API.

members.name: CustomUnifiedTrackingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Unified Tracking API.

members.name: CustomPickupBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Pickup API.

members.name: CustomReturnsBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Returns API.

members.name: CustomInternetmarkeBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Internetmarke API.

members.name: CustomLocationFinderBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override for the Location Finder API.

members.name: ShippingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective shipping API base URL (Parcel DE Shipping v2).

members.name: TrackingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Parcel DE Tracking base URL (v0, XML).

members.name: UnifiedTrackingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Unified Tracking base URL (JSON). No sandbox available.

members.name: PickupBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Pickup API base URL (Parcel DE Pickup v3).

members.name: ReturnsBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Returns API base URL (Parcel DE Returns v1).

members.name: InternetmarkeBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Internetmarke API base URL (Post DE Internetmarke v1). No sandbox available.

members.name: LocationFinderBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective Location Finder API base URL (Unified v1). No sandbox available.

members.name: CustomTokenUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom token endpoint URL override. When set, this takes precedence over the default DHL ROPC token URL.

members.name: Dispose()
members.description: Disposes the semaphore used for thread synchronization.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets the COD amount to collect.

members.name: Currency
members.description: Gets the currency. Defaults to EUR.

members.name: AccountHolder
members.description: Gets the bank account holder name.

members.name: Iban
members.description: Gets the IBAN.

members.name: Bic
members.description: Gets the BIC (optional).

members.name: AccountReference
members.description: Gets the account reference.

members.name: TransferNote1
members.description: Gets the transfer note line 1.

members.name: TransferNote2
members.description: Gets the transfer note line 2.

members.name: Type
members.description: Gets the type of delivery address. Defaults to .

members.name: LockerId
members.description: Gets the Packstation locker ID (100-999), if delivering to a locker.

members.name: PostNumber
members.description: Gets the recipient's DHL post number (6-10 digits), required for Packstation delivery.

members.name: RetailId
members.description: Gets the retail ID (post office/Filiale number), if delivering to a post office.

members.name: PoBoxId
members.description: Gets the PO box ID, if delivering to a PO box.

members.name: InvoiceNo
members.description: Gets the invoice number.

members.name: ExportType
members.description: Gets the export type (e.g. "COMMERCIAL_GOODS", "GIFT", "DOCUMENT", "COMMERCIAL_SAMPLE", "RETURN_OF_GOODS").

members.name: ExportDescription
members.description: Gets the export description.

members.name: ShippingConditions
members.description: Gets the shipping conditions (Incoterms, e.g. "DAP", "DDP").

members.name: PostalCharges
members.description: Gets the postal charges amount.

members.name: PostalChargesCurrency
members.description: Gets the postal charges currency. Defaults to EUR.

members.name: Items
members.description: Gets the customs items in the shipment.

members.name: Description
members.description: Gets the item description.

members.name: CountryOfOrigin
members.description: Gets the country of origin (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3).

members.name: HsCode
members.description: Gets the HS tariff code.

members.name: Quantity
members.description: Gets the quantity.

members.name: Weight
members.description: Gets the weight in kilograms.

members.name: Value
members.description: Gets the declared value per item.

members.name: Currency
members.description: Gets the value currency. Defaults to EUR.

members.name: FirstName
members.description: Gets the recipient's first name.

members.name: LastName
members.description: Gets the recipient's last name.

members.name: DateOfBirth
members.description: Gets the recipient's date of birth (yyyy-MM-dd).

members.name: MinimumAge
members.description: Gets the minimum age requirement: "A16" or "A18".

members.name: Format
members.description: Gets the desired label output format. Defaults to .

members.name: PrintFormat
members.description: Gets the paper size for the label. Defaults to .

members.name: Combine
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether to combine multiple labels into a single document.

members.name: IncludeDocs
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether to include additional documents (e.g. customs forms).

members.name: BillingNumber
members.description: Gets the billing number for the return shipment.

members.name: ReturnAddress
members.description: Gets the return address the parcel is sent back to. If not specified, the shipment's shipper address is used.

members.name: ReturnAddressContact
members.description: Gets the contact information for the return address. Only applied when ReturnAddress is set.

members.name: BillingNumber
members.description: Gets the DHL billing number (14-digit EKP + product + participation).

members.name: Profile
members.description: Gets the DHL business customer profile name. Required by the API.

members.name: Product
members.description: Gets the DHL shipping product. Defaults to .

members.name: DhlConsignee
members.description: Gets DHL-specific consignee delivery options (locker, post office, etc.).

members.name: ValueAddedServices
members.description: Gets optional value-added services for the shipment.

members.name: LabelOptions
members.description: Gets optional label generation options.

members.name: CustomsDetails
members.description: Gets optional customs details for international shipments.

members.name: CostCenter
members.description: Gets the optional cost center reference.

members.name: CreationSoftware
members.description: Gets the optional creation software identifier.

members.name: PreferredDay
members.description: Gets the preferred delivery day in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2026-02-20").

members.name: PreferredLocation
members.description: Gets the preferred drop-off location description (e.g. "Garage").

members.name: PreferredNeighbour
members.description: Gets the preferred neighbour name for alternative delivery.

members.name: CashOnDelivery
members.description: Gets the cash-on-delivery details including amount and bank account.

members.name: InsuredValue
members.description: Gets the declared insured value amount, if applicable.

members.name: InsuredValueCurrency
members.description: Gets the currency for . Defaults to EUR if not specified.

members.name: BulkyGoods
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether the shipment is classified as bulky goods.

members.name: NamedPersonOnly
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether delivery is restricted to the named person only.

members.name: NoNeighbourDelivery
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether neighbour delivery should be prevented.

members.name: SignedForByRecipient
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether the recipient must sign for the shipment.

members.name: Premium
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether premium delivery is requested.

members.name: ClosestDropPoint
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether to deliver to the closest drop point.

members.name: PostalDeliveryDutyPaid
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether postal delivery duty paid is requested.

members.name: Endorsement
members.description: Gets the endorsement type for international shipments: "RETURN" or "ABANDON".

members.name: VisualCheckOfAge
members.description: Gets the visual check of age requirement: "A16" or "A18".

members.name: ParcelOutletRouting
members.description: Gets the parcel outlet routing email address.

members.name: IdentCheck
members.description: Gets ident check details for identity verification on delivery.

members.name: DhlRetoure
members.description: Gets DHL retoure (return label) details.

members.name: Success
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether the manifest was created successfully.

members.name: Message
members.description: Gets an optional message with additional details about the result.

members.name: Property
members.description: Gets the property path that caused the validation issue, if available.

members.name: Message
members.description: Gets the validation message text.

members.name: Severity
members.description: Gets the severity level of this validation issue.

members.name: Valid
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether the shipment data is valid.

members.name: Messages
members.description: Gets the list of validation messages. May contain warnings even when is true.

members.name: Language
members.description: Gets the preferred language code for tracking event descriptions (e.g. "de", "en"). Defaults to "de".

members.name: ZipCode
members.description: Gets the recipient zip code for enhanced tracking data (required for some request types).

members.name: Services
members.description: Gets the underlying service collection.

members.name: Username
members.description: Gets or sets the GO! Connect API username for Basic Auth.

members.name: Password
members.description: Gets or sets the GO! Connect API password for Basic Auth.

members.name: ResponsibleStation
members.description: Gets or sets the 3-character responsible station code (e.g. "FRA"). Required for shipping operations.

members.name: CustomerId
members.description: Gets or sets the customer ID (max 7 characters).

members.name: UseSandbox
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the GO! Express sandbox environment.

members.name: CustomBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override. When set, this takes precedence over the setting.

members.name: BaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective shipping API base URL. Uses if set, otherwise selects sandbox or production based on .

members.name: TrackingBaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective tracking API base URL. The tracking API uses a different base path (/external/api/v1/) than the shipping API (/external/ci/).

members.name: Service
members.description: Gets or sets the GO! Express service type (e.g. ON, INT, LET).

members.name: Pickup
members.description: Gets or sets the pickup time window.

members.name: Delivery
members.description: Gets or sets the optional delivery time window.

members.name: SelfPickup
members.description: Gets or sets whether the sender delivers to the GO! station (self-pickup by GO!).

members.name: SelfDelivery
members.description: Gets or sets whether the recipient picks up at the GO! station (self-delivery).

members.name: FreightCollect
members.description: Gets or sets whether the recipient pays the freight.

members.name: IdentCheck
members.description: Gets or sets whether identity verification is required at delivery.

members.name: ReceiptNotice
members.description: Gets or sets whether a receipt notice is required.

members.name: IsNeutralPickup
members.description: Gets or sets whether this is a neutral pickup (consignor address hidden from consignee).

members.name: NeutralAddress
members.description: Gets or sets the neutral address (used when is true).

members.name: NeutralAddressContact
members.description: Gets or sets optional contact information for the neutral address.

members.name: InsuranceAmount
members.description: Gets or sets the insurance amount.

members.name: InsuranceCurrency
members.description: Gets or sets the insurance currency (e.g. "EUR").

members.name: CashOnDeliveryAmount
members.description: Gets or sets the cash on delivery amount.

members.name: CashOnDeliveryCurrency
members.description: Gets or sets the cash on delivery currency (e.g. "EUR").

members.name: ValueOfGoodsAmount
members.description: Gets or sets the declared value of goods.

members.name: ValueOfGoodsCurrency
members.description: Gets or sets the value of goods currency (e.g. "EUR").

members.name: CostCenter
members.description: Gets or sets an optional cost center reference.

members.name: Content
members.description: Gets or sets the shipment content description.

members.name: LabelFormat
members.description: Gets or sets the desired label format. Defaults to .

members.name: Dimensions
members.description: Gets or sets free-form dimensions string (e.g. "120x80x60").

members.name: ShipperRemarks
members.description: Gets or sets remarks for the shipper address.

members.name: ConsigneeRemarks
members.description: Gets or sets remarks for the consignee address.

members.name: ShipperTelephoneAvis
members.description: Gets or sets whether telephone avis is requested for the shipper.

members.name: ConsigneeTelephoneAvis
members.description: Gets or sets whether telephone avis is requested for the consignee.

members.name: ConsigneeDeliveryCode
members.description: Gets or sets the delivery code for the consignee.

members.name: ConsigneeDeliveryCodeEncryption
members.description: Gets or sets whether the consignee delivery code should be encrypted.

members.name: Date
members.description: Gets or sets the date.

members.name: TimeFrom
members.description: Gets or sets the earliest time.

members.name: TimeTill
members.description: Gets or sets the latest time.

members.name: AvisFrom
members.description: Gets or sets the earliest avis (notification) time.

members.name: AvisTill
members.description: Gets or sets the latest avis (notification) time.

members.name: WeekendOrHolidayIndicator
members.description: Gets or sets the weekend or holiday indicator for this time window.

members.name: Services
members.description: Gets the underlying service collection.

members.name: Username
members.description: Gets or sets the LetterXpress account username. Generated under "Mein Konto > Zugangsdaten > LXP API".

members.name: ApiKey
members.description: Gets or sets the LetterXpress API key. Generated under "Mein Konto > Zugangsdaten > LXP API".

members.name: UseTestMode
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use the LetterXpress test mode. In test mode ("mode": "test") submitted jobs are not processed but stored in the "Postbox" where they can be reviewed, deleted, or sent. Postbox jobs are deleted after 7 days. When , jobs are processed directly ("mode": "live").

members.name: CustomBaseUrl
members.description: Gets or sets a custom base URL override. When set, this takes precedence over the default production URL.

members.name: BaseUrl
members.description: Gets the effective API base URL. Uses if set, otherwise the production URL. A trailing slash is appended if missing so that relative request URIs (e.g. balance, printjobs) resolve correctly.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets the current balance.

members.name: Currency
members.description: Gets the currency (e.g. EUR).

members.name: Included
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the bank form is already included in the PDF's last sheet. When , the payment detail fields below are ignored and the last (blank) sheet is used.

members.name: Payee
members.description: Gets or sets the payee. Max. 27 characters. Ignored when is .

members.name: Iban
members.description: Gets or sets the IBAN. Max. 34 characters.

members.name: Bic
members.description: Gets or sets the BIC. Max. 11 characters.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets or sets the amount. Max. 12 characters.

members.name: PurposeOfPayment
members.description: Gets or sets the purpose of payment. Max. 27 characters.

members.name: PurposeOfPayment2
members.description: Gets or sets the second purpose of payment line. Max. 27 characters.

members.name: Id
members.description: Gets the e-mail job ID.

members.name: EmailSender
members.description: Gets the sender e-mail address.

members.name: EmailReceiver
members.description: Gets the recipient e-mail address.

members.name: EmailOption
members.description: Gets the SMART@MAIL option (maildirect, mailplus, mailsecure).

members.name: SentAt
members.description: Gets the timestamp the e-mail was sent, if available.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets the net amount charged.

members.name: Vat
members.description: Gets the VAT.

members.name: Status
members.description: Gets the job status (e.g. queue, hold, success).

members.name: Subject
members.description: Gets the e-mail subject.

members.name: Content
members.description: Gets the e-mail content.

members.name: Footer
members.description: Gets the e-mail footer.

members.name: CreatedAt
members.description: Gets the creation timestamp.

members.name: PrintJobId
members.description: Gets the ID of the associated print job, when the e-mail job is part of a serial response.

members.name: PrintJob
members.description: Gets the associated print job, returned for MailPlus jobs.

members.name: EmailJobs
members.description: Gets the created e-mail jobs.

members.name: PrintJobs
members.description: Gets any print jobs created alongside the e-mail jobs (e.g. for MailPlus or pages without a white code).

members.name: EmailOption
members.description: Gets or sets the SMART@MAIL delivery option.

members.name: EmailReceiver
members.description: Gets or sets the valid recipient e-mail address.

members.name: Id
members.description: Gets the invoice ID.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets the net amount.

members.name: Vat
members.description: Gets the VAT.

members.name: InvoiceDate
members.description: Gets the invoice date.

members.name: Base64Data
members.description: Gets the invoice PDF as base64, returned only when retrieving a single invoice.

members.name: FirstPage
members.description: Gets or sets the background PDF for the first page.

members.name: OtherPages
members.description: Gets or sets the background PDF for all other pages.

members.name: File
members.description: Gets or sets the letter PDF as raw bytes. Max. 50 MB.

members.name: Specification
members.description: Gets or sets the print and shipping specification.

members.name: FilenameOriginal
members.description: Gets or sets the original file name (e.g. Rechnung-123456.pdf). Optional; necessary for LXP SMART@MAIL and returned when retrieving jobs.

members.name: Registered
members.description: Gets or sets the registered mail option. Registered mail can only be sent nationally. Defaults to .

members.name: DispatchDate
members.description: Gets or sets the dispatch date. Optional; must be in the future.

members.name: SerialLetter
members.description: Gets or sets serial letter options. Cannot be combined with .

members.name: EmailLetter
members.description: Gets or sets LXP SMART@MAIL e-mail options for a single job. Cannot be combined with .

members.name: Attachments
members.description: Gets or sets additional attachments as raw PDF bytes. Each attachment must be A4 portrait (29.7 x 21.0 cm). The order is preserved.

members.name: Backgrounds
members.description: Gets or sets the letter background PDFs.

members.name: TermsAndConditions
members.description: Gets or sets the terms and conditions PDF.

members.name: BankForm
members.description: Gets or sets the bank transfer form.

members.name: Notice
members.description: Gets or sets an arbitrary notice stored with the job. Max. 255 characters.

members.name: Color
members.description: Gets or sets the print color. Defaults to .

members.name: Mode
members.description: Gets or sets the print mode. Defaults to .

members.name: Shipping
members.description: Gets or sets the shipping destination. Defaults to .

members.name: C4
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use a C4 envelope. Optional, applies to letters under 9 sheets.

members.name: Items
members.description: Gets the items on the current page.

members.name: Pagination
members.description: Gets the pagination metadata, if available.

members.name: Total
members.description: Gets the total number of items.

members.name: Count
members.description: Gets the number of items on the current page.

members.name: CurrentPage
members.description: Gets the current page number.

members.name: LastPage
members.description: Gets the last page number.

members.name: PerPage
members.description: Gets the number of items per page.

members.name: FirstPageUrl
members.description: Gets the URL of the first page, if any.

members.name: LastPageUrl
members.description: Gets the URL of the last page, if any.

members.name: NextPageUrl
members.description: Gets the URL of the next page, if any.

members.name: PrevPageUrl
members.description: Gets the URL of the previous page, if any.

members.name: Pages
members.description: Gets or sets the number of pages.

members.name: Color
members.description: Gets or sets the print color. Defaults to .

members.name: Mode
members.description: Gets or sets the print mode. Defaults to .

members.name: Shipping
members.description: Gets or sets the shipping destination. Only and are valid for price requests.

members.name: C4
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to use a C4 envelope.

members.name: EmailOption
members.description: Gets or sets the SMART@MAIL e-mail option. Optional.

members.name: Registered
members.description: Gets or sets the registered mail option. Optional; only national shipping is supported for registered mail.

members.name: Price
members.description: Gets the calculated gross price.

members.name: Pages
members.description: Gets the number of pages the price was calculated for.

members.name: Color
members.description: Gets the print color the price was calculated for.

members.name: Mode
members.description: Gets the print mode the price was calculated for.

members.name: Shipping
members.description: Gets the shipping destination the price was calculated for.

members.name: Id
members.description: Gets the print job ID.

members.name: Shipping
members.description: Gets the shipping destination (e.g. national).

members.name: Mode
members.description: Gets the print mode (e.g. simplex).

members.name: Color
members.description: Gets the print color (1 for black/white, 4 for color).

members.name: C4
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether a C4 envelope is used.

members.name: Registered
members.description: Gets the registered mail option (r1, r2), if any.

members.name: BankForm
members.description: Gets a value indicating whether a bank form is attached.

members.name: Notice
members.description: Gets the notice stored with the job.

members.name: Status
members.description: Gets the job status (e.g. queue, hold, done, canceled, draft).

members.name: DispatchDate
members.description: Gets the dispatch date, if set.

members.name: FilenameOriginal
members.description: Gets the original file name, if provided.

members.name: CreatedAt
members.description: Gets the creation timestamp. The API reports times in German local time (Europe/Berlin).

members.name: UpdatedAt
members.description: Gets the last update timestamp. The API reports times in German local time (Europe/Berlin).

members.name: Items
members.description: Gets the recipient items of the job.

members.name: Address
members.description: Gets the recipient address as a single line.

members.name: Pages
members.description: Gets the number of pages.

members.name: Amount
members.description: Gets the net amount charged for this item.

members.name: Vat
members.description: Gets the VAT for this item.

members.name: Status
members.description: Gets the item status (e.g. queue, sent).

members.name: TrackingCode
members.description: Gets the registered mail tracking code, if available.

members.name: Base64Data
members.description: Gets the rendered letter PDF as base64, returned only when retrieving a single job.

members.name: DispatchDate
members.description: Gets or sets the new dispatch date.

members.name: Registered
members.description: Gets or sets the new registered mail option.

members.name: Notice
members.description: Gets or sets the new notice.

members.name: Color
members.description: Gets or sets the new print color.

members.name: Mode
members.description: Gets or sets the new print mode.

members.name: Shipping
members.description: Gets or sets the new shipping destination.

members.name: C4
members.description: Gets or sets the new C4 envelope flag.

members.name: PagesSeparatorType
members.description: Gets or sets the separator type.

members.name: PagesSeparatorValue
members.description: Gets or sets the separator value: a keyword when is , or a page count when it is .

members.name: Terms
members.description: Gets or sets the terms and conditions PDF.

members.name: OnAllPages
members.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the terms are inserted behind all pages () or only behind the first page ().

members.name: Amount
